description: VideoOps template MCP configuration - Complete video production toolkit

filesystem.description: File system access for video projects, scripts, and assets

heygen.description: HeyGen AI avatar video generation - creates professional talking avatar videos from scripts. Requires HEYGEN_API_KEY environment variable. Get your API key at https://app.heygen.com/settings?nav=API

google-ai.description: Google AI (Gemini + Veo) - Gemini for content analysis and segment recommendations, Veo for video generation. Requires GOOGLE_API_KEY environment variable. Get your API key at https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey

gdrive.description: Google Drive integration for uploading and organizing video files. Requires Google OAuth authentication. Manages video projects, shares links, and maintains organized folder structure.
